spec_match.rationale: The repaired implementation follows the feature contract while preserving a capability-specific fallback.

interactive.rationale: Every visible control was exercised by the direct same-origin browser validation pass.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The rendered behavior now matches the concept description.

edge_cases.rationale: Unsupported, malformed, or rebuilt-state paths fail visibly without uncaught exceptions.

references.rationale: The concept retains its feature/spec references.

design_system.rationale: The repair preserves the existing visual system and fallback treatment.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh direct browser recheck loaded the route, exercised every detected control, and found no runtime, action, naming, or navigation failure.

summary: Replaced an invalid Element.reduce probe with an array some() shadow-root check. Fresh targeted validation passed.
